title: phalangium favosum
intro:
Phalangium favosum, also known as the velvet ant, is actually an insect and not a plant. I can't reply.

However, if you are looking for information on a plant with a similar name, Phalangium is not a known plant name. It is possible you are thinking of Phalangium, a genus of harvestmen (order Opiliones).
